虽然说是系统文
但是此系统非彼系统
居然是人为系统
构思新奇，情节紧凑
人物科幻足够立体
五星好评，除了更新有点慢
嘿嘿"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1597821106,"group_id":"6846543962803538951","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书在写的过程中，或许几十年后我就是白金作家了嘿嘿（破10万赞👀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1GrWOFV4K4xs2Hl2H0MpfLREOQTrEHnaRVUX86jGvfy","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3c3d0c41f5684825a51de0b445e04751~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797162&x-signature=TRm2chTsbj9MtLJCdkC7DPzVJf4%3D","user_id":"1767660602794184","user_name":"魂凌瑟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1767660602794184","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1732594186,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6846543962803538951","book_info":{"abstract":"一个高二期末只考了197分的学渣，是怎么用一年的时间，逆袭的？
脑潜能研究员来帮忙。
别人的系统是天上掉下来的，他的系统是自己打造的，依据心理暗示力获得超强的目标驱动力，目标分解建立大脑奖赏机制，从每一个小目标的达成，获得多巴胺的分泌。让学习变成像嗑瓜子一样上瘾的事情。
不仅如此，他还成为了奥赛冠军、功夫高手、电影明星、亿万富翁……
一年后，世界名校来争抢。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/13752000191507b7e949c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"借草还魂","author_id":"","book_id":"6846543962803538951","book_name":"真实学霸系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2011人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6846544847222866436","read_count":"2011","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1005076"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"474","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/13752000191507b7e949c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388791&x-signature=CyPqZgV7Cbd9nJ85%2BaGpzJeKsBs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"71697874986","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323023951E26D78CE78527F089864"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":73,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8934,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8934,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":55805},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6861854878097588239","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书故事新颖，却又接近生活，颇为励志，以大师的学霸系统实验开始，通过主角方默言从学渣向学霸的努力奋斗，展现了一个穷苦少年的逆袭之路！凭借着大师高超的学习方法和方默言的顽强毅力，在学习能力逐渐提高的同时，默言的生活，友情甚至爱情也不断迎来美好，虽然平凡却不平庸，虽然磨难颇多却不自甘堕落，正如书中所说：当你真正开始拼尽全力的去做好某一件事时，整个世界都会成为你的助力！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1597650096,"group_id":"6846543962803538951","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不想吃天鹅肉的癞蛤蟆不是好蛤蟆","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ijwr3oz7dcvN5Vcpkk6rqlTrt2grPbW+fuS3jso399","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/33d219b36f444e7588797ce1585d4037~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793303&x-signature=jXgyL3RFbtS%2FIx6iDSD6WiH4fbY%3D","user_id":"1433398729005692","user_name":"龚林洲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1433398729005692","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6846543962803538951","book_info":{"abstract":"一个高二期末只考了197分的学渣，是怎么用一年的时间，逆袭的？
